name: comforest
description: Claude Code plugins for Kotlin/Java Spring Boot development with Gradle. Includes worktree management, desktop notifications, and structured feature development workflows.

plugins.name: default
plugins.description: General-purpose hooks for WSL2/Windows development. Automatic worktree creation and desktop notifications for permission requests and task completion.

plugins.name: kopring
plugins.description: Gradle + Kotlin Spring Boot plugin. Structured 3-phase feature development skill (plan → implement → PR) with code convention, deployment safety, and security review.
